eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Dallas, TX; at 08:01 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 08:31 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Dallas County HSEM: TEST. This is a TEST of the Public Alert & Warning System during the Texas statewide alerting drill between 10:00 AM and 12:30 PM today. There is no emergency. No action is needed.  This is only TEST.
